svg.text: Stop approving AI plans you barely read.
Visual annotation, inline feedback, and iteration — before a single line of code gets written.
• BM25 keyword search across text fields
• Semantic search via ELSER sparse vectors
• Design search and RAG query layout
Extract title, description, body text → bulk index
BM25 + semantic search merged with RRF scoring
Add a global comment or attach an image…
Can also attach images · iterate as many rounds as needed
